adr_entry: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation adds a standard Three.js EffectComposer pipeline using built-in three/examples/jsm postprocessing (no new dependencies). The new `src/visual/composer.ts` module follows the existing optional-feature pattern (null return for disabled tiers, conditional execution in render loop). All changes extend existing interfaces (`QualityProfile`, `LoopDeps`, `attachResizeHandler` signature) without breaking contracts.
